answer:
<think> The question asks about the head coach of the 2015-16 Missouri Tigers women's basketball team. To answer this, I need to recall information about the team's coaching history. I know that Robin Pingeton was the head coach of the team from 2011 to 2015. Since the question mentions a sixth year head coach, I can infer that the coach in question was hired to replace Robin Pingeton, who was in her fifth year as head coach in 2014-15. Therefore, the coach hired to replace Pingeton would be in their sixth year in 2015-16. I need to recall the name of the coach who took over after Pingeton. After some thought, I remember that the coach who replaced Robin Pingeton was Robin Pingeton's assistant, and that assistant was Kellie Harper. Kellie Harper was hired as the head coach of the Missouri Tigers women's basketball team in 2015, replacing Robin Pingeton. Therefore, Kellie Harper was the sixth year head coach of the team in 2015-16.</think>
<answer> Kellie Harper </answer>
